display.title: Display & Sound
display.subtitle: Tune visuals and audio alerts to your preferences.
display.section_display_subtitle: Adjust how the window renders backgrounds and effects.
display.show_remaining_limits_sub: Display what is left instead of what is used.
display.show_file_path_sub: Display the parent path next to file links in messages.
display.split_chat_diff: Split chat and diff center panes
display.split_chat_diff_sub: Show chat and diff side by side instead of swapping between them.
display.auto_gen_titles_sub: Generate a short title from your first message (uses extra tokens).
display.section_chat_subtitle: Control how much conversation history is retained per thread.
display.unlimited_history_sub: Keep full thread history in memory (may impact performance).
display.scrollback_preset_sub: Higher values keep more history but may increase memory usage. Use "Sync from server" on a thread to re-fetch older messages.
display.max_items_help: Range: {{min}}–{{max}}. Counts messages, tool calls, and other conversation items.
display.reduce_transparency_sub: Use solid surfaces instead of glass.
display.ui_font_sub: Applies to all UI text. Leave empty to use the default system font stack.
display.code_font_sub: Applies to git diffs and other mono-spaced readouts.
display.code_font_size_sub: Adjusts code and diff text size.
display.notification_sounds_sub: Play a sound when a long-running agent finishes while the window is unfocused.
display.system_notifications_sub: Show a system notification when a long-running agent finishes while the window is unfocused.
display.subagent_notifications_sub: Include spawned sub-agent threads in system notifications.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Group related workspaces and reorder projects within each group.
projects.subsection_groups_sub: Create group labels for related repositories.
projects.subsection_projects_sub: Assign projects to groups and adjust their order.
projects.delete_group_detail: Projects in this group will move to "{{ungroupedLabel}}".

environments.title: Environments
environments.subtitle: Configure per-project setup scripts and worktree locations.
environments.global_root_sub: Default location for new worktrees when a project does not override it. Each project gets its own subfolder under this root.
environments.setup_script_sub: Runs once in a dedicated terminal after each new worktree is created.
environments.worktrees_folder_sub: Custom location for this project's worktrees. Leave empty to use the global root or the built-in default.
environments.toast_clipboard_unavailable: Clipboard access is unavailable in this environment. Copy the script manually instead.
environments.toast_clipboard_write_error: Could not write to the clipboard. Copy the script manually instead.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: App version, build metadata, and update controls.
about.auto_check_sub: When enabled, CodexMonitor checks for new app versions on launch.
about.unavailable: Updates are unavailable in this runtime.
about.latest: You are on the latest version.

git.title: Git
git.subtitle: Manage how diffs are loaded in the Git sidebar.
git.ignore_whitespace_sub: Hides whitespace-only changes in local and commit diffs.
git.commit_prompt_sub: Used when generating commit messages. Include <1>{diff}</1> to insert the git diff.
git.commit_model_sub: The model used when generating commit messages. Leave on default to use the workspace model.

composer.title: Composer
composer.subtitle: Control helpers and formatting behavior inside the message editor.
composer.subsection_presets_sub: Choose a starting point and fine-tune the toggles below.
composer.followup_behavior_sub: Choose the default while a run is active. Press {{shortcut}} to send the opposite behavior for one message.
composer.followup_hint_sub: Displays queue/steer shortcut guidance above the composer.
composer.preset_sub: Presets update the toggles below. Customize any setting after selecting.
composer.expand_space_sub: Typing ``` then Space inserts a fenced block.
composer.expand_enter_sub: Use Enter to expand ``` lines when enabled.
composer.lang_tags_sub: Allows ```lang + Space to include a language.
composer.wrap_selection_sub: Wraps selected text when creating a fence.
composer.copy_no_fences_sub: When enabled, Copy is plain text. Hold {{modifier}} to include ``` fences.
composer.auto_wrap_multiline_sub: Wraps multi-line paste inside a fenced block.
composer.auto_wrap_codelike_sub: Wraps long single-line code snippets on paste.
composer.continue_lists_sub: Continues numbered and bulleted lists when the line has content.
composer.steer_unavailable_tooltip: Steer is unavailable in the current Codex config.
composer.steer_unavailable_help: Steer is unavailable in the current Codex config. Follow-ups will queue.

dictation.title: Dictation
dictation.subtitle: Enable microphone dictation with on-device transcription.
dictation.enable_sub: Downloads the selected Whisper model on first use.
dictation.lang_sub: Auto-detect stays on; this nudges the decoder toward your preference.
dictation.key_sub: Hold the key to start dictation, release to stop and process.

open_apps.title: Open in
open_apps.subtitle: Customize the Open in menu shown in the title bar and file previews.
open_apps.commands_help: Commands receive the selected path as the final argument.
open_apps.mac_help: Apps open via `open -a` with optional args.
open_apps.win_help: Apps run as an executable with optional args.

server.title: Server
server.sub_mobile: Configure TCP host/token from your desktop setup, then run a connection test.
server.sub_desktop: Configure how CodexMonitor exposes TCP backend access for mobile and remote clients. Desktop usage remains local unless you explicitly connect through remote mode.
server.mode_sub: Local keeps desktop requests in-process. Remote routes desktop requests through the same TCP transport path used by mobile clients.
server.switch_remote_help: Switch the active remote here. The fields below edit the active entry.
server.keep_running: Keep daemon running after app closes
server.keep_running_sub: If disabled, CodexMonitor stops managed TCP daemon processes before exit.
server.remote_backend_sub: Use the Tailscale host from your desktop CodexMonitor app (Server section), for example <1>macbook.your-tailnet.ts.net:4732</1>.
server.remote_backend_sub2: This host/token is used by mobile clients and desktop remote-mode testing.
server.connection_test_sub: Make sure your desktop app daemon is running and reachable on Tailscale, then retry this test.
server.mobile_daemon_sub: Start this daemon before connecting from iOS. It uses your current token and listens on <1>0.0.0.0:{{port}}</1>, matching your configured host port.
server.manual_cmd: Command template (manual fallback) for starting the daemon:
server.infra_only: Use your own infrastructure only. On iOS, get the Tailscale hostname and token from your desktop CodexMonitor setup.
server.infra_only2: Mobile access should stay scoped to your own infrastructure (tailnet). CodexMonitor does not provide hosted backend services.
server.daemon_error: Mobile daemon is in an error state.
server.ts_install: Install Tailscale on both desktop and iOS to continue.
server.token_empty: Remote backend token is empty. Set one before exposing daemon access.
server.modal_del_msg: Remove <1>{{name}}</1> from saved remotes? This only removes the profile from this device.

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Customize keyboard shortcuts for file actions, composer, panels, and navigation.
shortcuts.search_sub: Filter by section name, action, or default shortcut.
shortcuts.placeholder_type_default: Press a new shortcut while focused. Default: {{keys}}
shortcuts.group_file_sub: Create agents and worktrees from the keyboard.
shortcuts.group_composer_sub: Cycle between model, access, reasoning, and collaboration modes.

agents.fallback_desc: Fallback model while workspace model list is unavailable.
agents.loading_metadata: Loading workspace model metadata. Using fallback model defaults for now.
agents.using_fallback: Using fallback model defaults until workspace model metadata is available.
agents.error_max_threads: Max threads must be an integer between {{min}} and {{max}}.
agents.error_max_depth: Max depth must be an integer between {{min}} and {{max}}.
agents.confirm_delete_msg: Delete agent and managed config file?
agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitle: Configure multi-agent mode, limits, and custom agent roles.
agents.sub_create_desc: Add a custom role under [agents.<name>] and create its config file.
agents.sub_configured_desc: Manage custom roles and their per-agent config files.
agents.builtin_msg: Built-in roles from Codex are still available:
agents.max_threads_sub: Maximum open agent threads. Valid range: 1-12. Changes save immediately.
agents.max_depth_sub: Maximum nested spawn depth. Valid range: 1-4. Changes save immediately.
agents.name: Name
agents.rename_managed: Rename managed config file when agent name changes
agents.aria_generate: Generate description and developer instructions with AI

codex.title: Codex
codex.subtitle: Configure the Codex CLI used by CodexMonitor and validate the install.
codex.default_path_sub: Leave empty to use the system PATH resolution.
codex.default_args_sub: Extra flags passed before app-server. Use quotes for values with spaces.
codex.default_args_sub2: These settings apply to the shared Codex app-server used across all connected workspaces.
codex.default_args_sub3: Per-thread override processing ignores unsupported flags: ...
codex.model_sub: Sourced from the first workspace and used when there is no thread-specific override.
codex.reasoning_sub: Available options depend on the selected model.
codex.reasoning_none: The selected model does not expose reasoning effort options.
codex.access_mode_sub: Used when there is no thread-specific override.
codex.review_mode_sub: Choose whether /review runs in the current thread or a detached review thread.
codex.placeholder_global_instructions: Add global instructions for Codex agents…
codex.models_add_workspace: Add a workspace to load available models.
codex.models_loading: Loading models from the first workspace…

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Manage stable and experimental Codex features.
features.personality_sub: Choose Codex communication style (writes top-level personality in config.toml).
features.pause_queued: Pause queued messages when a response is required
features.pause_queued_sub: Keep queued messages paused while Codex is waiting for plan accept/changes or your answers.
features.no_stable: No stable feature flags returned by Codex.
features.no_experimental: No preview or under-development feature flags returned by Codex.
features.connect_workspace: Connect a workspace to load Codex feature flags.
features.desc_ghost_commit: Create a ghost commit at each turn.
features.desc_pty_exec: Use the single unified PTY-backed exec tool.
features.desc_js_repl: Enable JavaScript REPL tools backed by a persistent Node kernel.
features.desc_js_repl_only: Only expose js_repl tools directly to the model.
features.desc_search_rem: Removed legacy search flag kept for backward compatibility.
features.desc_metrics: Enable runtime metrics snapshots via a manual reader.
features.desc_rollout: Persist rollout metadata to a local SQLite database.
features.desc_memory: Enable startup memory extraction and memory consolidation.
features.desc_agents_md: Append additional AGENTS.md guidance to user instructions.
features.desc_linux_sandbox: Use the bubblewrap-based Linux sandbox pipeline.
features.desc_approvals: Allow approval requests and exec rule proposals.
features.desc_win_sandbox: Removed Windows sandbox flag kept for backward compatibility.
features.desc_win_sandbox_elevated: Removed elevated Windows sandbox flag kept for backward compatibility.
features.desc_compress_streaming: Compress streaming request bodies sent to codex-backend.
features.desc_apps_mcp: Route Apps MCP calls through the configured gateway.
features.desc_mcp_dep: Allow prompting and installing missing MCP dependencies.
features.desc_skill_env: Prompt for missing skill environment variable dependencies.
features.desc_turn_steering: Enable turn steering capability when supported by Codex.
features.desc_responses_ws: Use Responses API WebSocket transport for OpenAI by default.
features.desc_responses_ws_v2: Enable Responses API WebSocket v2 mode.
features.desc_legacy: Legacy feature flag kept for backward compatibility.
